name: The Golf Lounge
about: The Golf Lounge is an indoor golf simulator venue and bar located in Amherst, Ohio. It offers two simulator bays equipped with GC Hawk technology, providing a challenging and enjoyable experience for golfers of all skill levels. The facility includes a bar and seating area, making it unique as the only indoor golf simulator and bar in the area. Pricing is $30 per hour on weekdays and $40 per hour on weekends, with rates charged per bay rather than per person.
why_golfers_like_it: GC Hawk technology provides a realistic and challenging golfing experience
Convenient two-bay setup with flexible booking options
Unique combination of golf simulators and a full-service bar
Affordable pricing structure per bay rather than per person

food_and_drink.notes: Kitchen food available, though specific menu details are not provided

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, golf clubs are not provided by The Golf Lounge. Players must bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full bar and kitchen, so outside food and drink policies are not specified. It's recommended to enjoy their on-site offerings.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: One hour for one person to play 18 holes, and approximately four hours for four people to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't specifically mention kid-friendliness, but it does offer youth scramble leagues (9 holes), indicating they cater to junior golfers.
